description: Cursor Automations, Claude Code Review, overnight agents, geohot 69 agents. Coding agents shift from interactive to autonomous-background.

theme: AI agent security is the crisis of 2026
description: Three CVSS 10.0 RCEs (Langflow, n8n, Agenta-API) in six weeks all share same anti-pattern: dangerous code execution enabled by default.
Hackerbot-Claw autonomously attacked GitHub repos, CyberStrikeAI deployed at scale. AI is both weapon and target.
Cursor Automations ships always-on agents triggered by Slack/GitHub/PagerDuty. 30% of Cursor PRs from autonomous agents. Pattern shift from interactive to background agent execution.
NVIDIA NemoClaw, Microsoft Agent Framework, OpenClaw managed services all targeting GA simultaneously. Three-way enterprise agent orchestration battle.

nono kernel sandbox, pipelock network firewall, AgentBouncr deterministic governance, agent-security-scanner-mcp SAST, Overture visual planner all created in last 30 days. SANDWORM_MODE driving defense tooling wave.
414-point HN post argues MCP over-hyped vs CLI tools, Claude Code Cowork 10GB VM bundle without consent, AgentAudit finds 118 vulns across 194 packages
QA team halved with AI had buggiest quarter. Brain fry research shows high performers most affected. 80% Problem framework goes mainstream. Verification debt confirmed across multiple data points.

theme: Production architectures using dual-layer memory (Zep + Mem0), PostgreSQL for checkpointing.
description: Production architectures using dual-layer memory (Zep + Mem0), PostgreSQL for checkpointing.
Evidence: OpenAI Skills 11.6K, Google Workspace CLI 100+ skills, agency-agents 9.3K. Category: ecosystem

theme: Agent framework supply chain as critical vulnerability class
description: Evidence: Google Workspace CLI, Worktrunk, Ralph Orchestrator, AgentFS all Rust. Category: technology
Claude Code HTTP hooks Windsurf cascade transcript Cursor MCP Apps three vendors same pattern
OpenClaw compromise (13.4% malicious skills) exposes fundamental vulnerability in AI agent supply chains affecting all plugin marketplaces.
Claude Opus 4.6 vs GPT-5.3 Codex launched minutes apart. Both 80%+ on SWE-bench Verified. Chinese models (Zhipu GLM-5, DeepSeek V4) closing gap rapidly.
HN bans AI comments (2153pts). Technical communities enforcing human-only discourse. Expect platform-level bans to spread.

theme: AI coding tool crashes cybersecurity market
description: METR: SWE-bench PRs wouldn't be merged. EsoLang-Bench: benchmarks measure memorization. Billions in valuation may be measuring wrong things.
CVE-2026-26118 Azure MCP SSRF marks first cloud-hosted MCP vulnerability. Attack surface moving from local dev tools to production infrastructure.

theme: AI for Science becomes strategic priority
description: AWS AgentCore Policy GA (Cedar), Gartner Guardian Agents, JetStream M, LayerX RFP template. Agent governance is a new infrastructure category with real products.

Vercel removed 80% tools (3.5x faster, 100% success). GPT-5.4 Tool Search reduces token usage 47%. Claude Code context autopsy: 55% is tool definitions. Constraining models often degrades performance.
Four new agent memory frameworks in one day: memU 12.3K stars, Memori 12.3K stars, MemOS 6.1K stars, Zep Graphiti architecture. Memory as infrastructure not feature
Anthropic Super Bowl ads mock ChatGPT ads. Altman fires back. Galloway calls it strategic blunder. Competition moves from benchmarks to consumer brands.

theme: Vibeware: AI-generated malware as volume play
description: Moltbook acquired by Meta despite 1.5M exposed API keys. Security failures don't prevent M&A — they just lower price. Pattern: build fast, get acquired, fix later.
SCAFFOLD-CEGIS: 43.7% code iteration chains have security regressions. AI improves functional correctness while silently degrading security properties.

theme: OpenAI Pentagon deal triggers largest consumer AI migration
description: OpenAI robotics head resigns, ChatGPT 563% uninstall spike, Claude #1 App Store 16 countries. Safety positioning = competitive advantage.
Cursor Automations, Codex Automations, Windsurf Fast Context -- 3 major IDE vendors shipping event-driven autonomous agents simultaneously. Developer role shifts from operating to configuring.
Qwen team exodus (Junyang Lin + key researchers) over product vs research tension. Open-weight model ecosystem faces talent retention risk when commercial pressures override research priorities.
Agent infrastructure splitting into 6+ distinct product categories: sandboxes, routers, memory, knowledge graphs, orchestration, package management. Multiple competing projects in each layer.

theme: Frontier model arms race compressed to days
description: Amodei memo. Claude #1 App Store. ChatGPT uninstalls +295%. Defense tech dropping Claude. Market shifts on ethics.
Agent Client Protocol co-developed by JetBrains and Zed enables Cursor in all JetBrains IDEs. Follows MCP trajectory.

theme: Agent identity governance reaches billion-dollar category
description: ServiceNow 1B Veza acquisition 70% enterprises 23% strategy 88% incidents NIST RFI March 9

theme: Government AI safety retaliation precedent set
description: Direct confrontations between governments and AI labs intensifying. Pentagon vs Anthropic, US Treasury terminating Anthropic contract, Altman amending Pentagon deal terms, UK regulators vs xAI. Policy uncertainty for government-adjacent builders.

theme: Consumer adoption shift triggered by safety stance
description: Claude hits #1 App Store after Pentagon ban. First time safety ethics stance drives measurable consumer market share in AI. Import Memory feature captures switchers.
Expensive models (Opus 4.6) for strategy, mid-tier for standard tasks, small models for high-frequency execution. 90% cost savings vs all-Opus.
Google VP Mowry publicly warns LLM wrapper/aggregator startups face extinction. Only deep moat products like Cursor and Harvey survive. Clearest platform absorption signal.
Anthropic's guide shifts focus from "how you ask" to "what you provide."
Nvidia-Groq B for LPU inference silicon. Taalas 17K tok/s custom ASIC. VentureBeat: general-purpose GPU era ending for inference. Training vs inference chips splitting.
AI disruption fear no longer confined to SaaS - now spanning trucking, logistics, real estate, commercial services

theme: India AI Summit becomes leader convergence event
description: All major AI leaders (Pichai, Altman, Huang, Amodei, Gates, Hassabis) converge in New Delhi Feb 16-20.
OpenAI's GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark on Cerebras (1000 tok/s, 15x faster) is the first major move away from NVIDIA dependency. GLM-5 trained entirely on Huawei Ascend chips. The compute monopoly is cracking.
Seedance 2.0 following DeepSeek R1 pattern: open or accessible, high quality, rapid iteration. "DeepSeek moment" becoming a category.

theme: GitHub viral projects follow pattern: weekend hack → HN front page → media coverage → security conce
description: GitHub viral projects follow pattern: weekend hack → HN front page → media coverage → security concerns.

description: Thought leaders increasingly contrarian (LeCun betting against LLMs, Karpathy warning of "slopacolypse").

theme: Target length 2000-4000 words achievable with 5-6 active agents.

theme: Rust agent runtimes emerge as category
description: OpenFang (137K LOC) and ZeroClaw (3.4MB binary) both challenge Python-first agent assumption. Performance-critical deployments moving to compiled languages.

theme: Copyleft licensing existential crisis from AI
description: HN top story: AI reimplementation erodes copyleft. Redox OS bans AI code. tldraw moved tests private. Open-source licensing model may not survive AI coding era.
